array.string:
# Retry aether analysis publish at 06:00 MT if 23:00 run failed. # The 23:00 run may fail when AetherBot log is sparse (trading just started). # By 06:00, gpt_factcheck.py has created a complete Analysis file overnight. # This retry publishes that analysis to feed.json if it wasn't already. ROOT=~/Documents/Projects/Hyo TODAY=$(TZ=America/Denver date +%Y-%m-%d) ANALYSIS="$ROOT/agents/aether/analysis/Analysis_${TODAY}.txt"
# Check if already in feed ALREADY_PUBLISHED=$(python3 -c " import json with open('$ROOT/agents/sam/website/data/feed.json') as f: feed = json.load(f) ids = [r.get('id','') for r in feed.get('reports',[])] print('yes' if 'aether-analysis-$TODAY' in ids else 'no') " 2>/dev/null || echo "no")
if [[ "$ALREADY_PUBLISHED" == "yes" ]]; then echo "[aether-retry] Already published for $TODAY — skipping" exit 0 fi
if [[ ! -f "$ANALYSIS" ]]; then echo "[aether-retry] No analysis file found for $TODAY — skipping" exit 0 fi
echo "[aether-retry] Publishing analysis for $TODAY (was not published at 23:00)" HYO_ROOT="$ROOT" bash "$ROOT/bin/aether-publish-analysis.sh" "$TODAY" "$ANALYSIS" >> /tmp/hyo-aether-retry.log 2>&1 echo "[aether-retry] Done"
